title: Broadway Thru a Keyhole
writer: C. Graham Baker, Gene Towne, Walter Winchell
actors: Constance Cummings, Russ Columbo, Paul Kelly
plot: Racketeer Frank Rocci is smitten with Joan Whelan, a dancer at Texas Guinan's famous Broadway night spot. He uses his influence to help her get a starring role in the show, hoping that it will also get Joan to fall in love with hi...
